issues.description: Condition should be 'Always', not 'HasRestingDon'. The effect is unconditional; the DON!! cost (−1) is a resource payment option, not a conditional gate. HasRestingDon would incorrectly require resting DON!! to exist before the effect triggers.
Action type 'TrashFromHand' is incorrect. Card text says 'trash 1 card from your hand', which is a discard effect. Correct type is 'ForceDiscard' (legacy alias: TrashCard).
